message:
feat(lax): add functional scan API, ThreeFry2x32 PRNG, and vmap in_axes/out_axes tests

Add eval_scan_functional for full JAX-compatible scan(body_fn, carry, xs)
with multi-carry, reverse iteration, and per-step output stacking along
a new leading axis. Simplify eval_scan slice extraction using
slice_axis0. Implement ThreeFry2x32 counter-based PRNG (20-round Feistel
cipher with Skein rotation constants) matching jax._src.prng.threefry2x32.

Add 10 in_axes/out_axes vmap tests in fj-dispatch (default axis, None
broadcast, second-dim axis, mixed per-arg specs, output axis placement,
negative indexing, error paths) and 10 scan functional tests in fj-lax
(accumulate-sum, product, custom body, multi-carry, no-output, empty xs,
single element, tensor carry, reverse).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
